nasb.text: “You shall not oppress a stranger, since you yourselves know the feelings of a stranger, for you also were strangers in the land of Egypt.

esv.text: “You shall not oppress a sojourner. You know the heart of a sojourner, for you were sojourners in the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 不可壓迫寄居的，因為你們在埃及地也作過寄居的，知道寄居者的心情。

ccb.text: 不可欺凌在你们中间寄居的人，因为你们也曾经在埃及寄居，知道身在异乡的滋味。
